---
title: "Calculator: Combinations and permutations"
author: Tom Coleman
format: html
abstract-title: Summary
abstract: A calculator to provide the number of combinations and permutations for two integers.
---

```{r, setup, include = FALSE}
library("webexercises")
```


```{=html}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>nCr / nPr Calculator</title>

  <style>
    :root {
      --btn-color: #3f68b6;
      --btn-hover: #345597;
      --bg: #f7f9fc;
      --card: #ffffff;
      --text: #1f2937;
      --muted: #6b7280;
      --error: #b63f3f;
      --focus: #74a0ff;
    }

    body {
      margin:0;
      padding:2rem;
      background:var(--bg);
      font-family:system-ui;
      color:var(--text);
    }

    .container {
      max-width:560px;
      margin:0 auto;
      background:var(--card);
      padding:1.75rem;
      border-radius:12px;
      box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(16,24,40,.08);
    }

    h1 {
      margin:0 0 1rem;
      font-size:1.4rem;
    }

    p.helper {
      color:var(--muted);
      margin-bottom:1.25rem;
    }

    /* ✅ SIDE-BY-SIDE INPUTS */
    .grid {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap:1rem;
    }

    @media (min-width: 520px){
      .grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      }
    }

    label {
      font-weight:600;
      display:block;
      margin-bottom:.4rem;
    }

    input {
      width:100%;
      padding:.75rem;
      border-radius:8px;
      border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
      font-size:1rem;
      outline:none;
    }

    input:focus{
      border-color:var(--focus);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(116,160,255,.25);
    }

    .error {
      color:var(--error);
      font-size:.9rem;
      min-height:1.1rem;
    }

    /* ✅ BUTTON ROW LIKE YOUR OTHER CALCS */
    .buttons {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap:.75rem;
      margin-top:1.25rem;
    }

    .buttons-bottom {
      margin-top:.75rem;
    }

    button {
      padding:.75rem;
      border:none;
      border-radius:8px;
      background:var(--btn-color);
      color:white;
      font-weight:600;
      cursor:pointer;
    }

    button:hover {
      background:var(--btn-hover);
    }


    .clearBtn {
      background: #94a3b8;
      grid-column: span 2;
    }

    .output {
      margin-top:1.25rem;
      padding:1rem;
      background:#eef3ff;
      border-radius:8px;
      min-height:3rem;
      line-height:1.5;
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>
  <main class="container">
    <h1>Combinations / Permutations Calculator</h1>
    <p class="helper">
      Enter n and r to calculate combinations (nCr) or permutations (nPr).
    </p>

    <!-- ✅ SIDE-BY-SIDE INPUTS -->
    <div class="grid">
      <div>
        <label for="n">n (for example: 5)</label>
        <input id="n" type="text">
        <div id="errN" class="error"></div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <label for="r">r (for example: 2)</label>
        <input id="r" type="text">
        <div id="errR" class="error"></div>
      </div>
    </div>


    <div class="buttons">
      <button id="btnCr">Calculate nCr</button>
      <button id="btnPr">Calculate nPr</button>
      <button class="clearBtn" id="btnClear">Clear All</button>
    </div>


    <!-- OUTPUT -->
    <div class="output" id="outputBox"></div>

  </main>

<script>
const nIn = document.getElementById("n");
const rIn = document.getElementById("r");

const errN = document.getElementById("errN");
const errR = document.getElementById("errR");

const out = document.getElementById("outputBox");

function clearErrors(){
  errN.textContent="";
  errR.textContent="";
}

function clearOut(){
  out.textContent="";
}

function isInt(value){
  return /^\d+$/.test(value);
}

/* Efficient functions */
function nCr(n, r){
  r = Math.min(r, n - r);
  let result = 1;
  for(let i = 1; i <= r; i++){
    result = result * (n - r + i) / i;
  }
  return Math.round(result);
}

function nPr(n, r){
  let result = 1;
  for(let i = 0; i < r; i++){
    result *= (n - i);
  }
  return result;
}

function validateInputs(){
  clearErrors();
  clearOut();

  const nVal = nIn.value.trim();
  const rVal = rIn.value.trim();

  let valid = true;

  if(!isInt(nVal)){
    errN.textContent = "Enter a non-negative integer.";
    valid = false;
  }

  if(!isInt(rVal)){
    errR.textContent = "Enter a non-negative integer.";
    valid = false;
  }

  if(!valid) return null;

  const n = Number(nVal);
  const r = Number(rVal);

  if(r > n){
    errR.textContent = "r cannot be greater than n.";
    return null;
  }

  return { n, r };
}

/* ✅ nCr */
document.getElementById("btnCr").onclick = () => {
  const data = validateInputs();
  if(!data) return;

  const { n, r } = data;
  const result = nCr(n, r);

  out.innerHTML = `
    <strong>nCr = n! / (r!(n − r)!)</strong><br>
    ${n} C ${r} = ${result}
  `;
};

/* ✅ nPr */
document.getElementById("btnPr").onclick = () => {
  const data = validateInputs();
  if(!data) return;

  const { n, r } = data;
  const result = nPr(n, r);

  out.innerHTML = `
    <strong>nPr = n! / (n − r)!</strong><br>
    ${n} P ${r} = ${result}
  `;
};

/* ✅ CLEAR */
document.getElementById("btnClear").onclick = () => {
  nIn.value="";
  rIn.value="";
  clearErrors();
  clearOut();
  nIn.focus();
};

/* ✅ KEYBOARD SUPPORT */
[nIn, rIn].forEach((el, index)=>{
  el.addEventListener("keydown", (e)=>{
    if(e.key === "Enter"){
      document.getElementById("btnCr").click();
    }
    if(e.key === "Escape"){
      document.getElementById("btnClear").click();
    }
  });
});
</script>

</body>
</html>

```


## Version history {-}

v1.0: initial version created 06/26 by tdhc.
  
[This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1)
